TestTitle: Allocation matches the approved randomization schedule
Steps: Randomize 40 synthetic participants; export IRT allocation; compare to the approved list.
ExpectedResult: IRT allocation == list (sequence, kit, stratum) for all.

Steps: Randomize across weight strata; verify stratum assignment.
ExpectedResult: Each participant allocated within their entered stratum block.

Steps: Inspect allocation balance within each permuted block.
Two sites randomize concurrently; check uniqueness.
ExpectedResult: Each participant gets a unique randomization number; no collision.

TestTitle: Allocation reproducible from the frozen list
Steps: Reload the frozen list; re-run allocation.
Attempt to view treatment before dosing as a blinded role.
ExpectedResult: Concealed; blinded role sees kit ID only.

Steps: Enroll sentinel pair; try to dose 3rd before window.
Enroll to cohort cap + 1.
Open next cohort before SRC-approval flag set.
ExpectedResult: Next cohort blocked until SRC approval.

TestTitle: Correct dose level per active cohort
Steps: Verify dose level assigned per active cohort.
ExpectedResult: Kit dose level matches active cohort.

Steps: Screen 10 participants.
Mark screen-fail; attempt to randomize.
Re-screen a permitted screen-fail.
ExpectedResult: Re-screening allowed with new screening number.

Steps: Enroll to study cap + 1.
Dispense at Day 1; compare kit to allocation.
Dispense across visits with differing kit types.
Attempt dispensing outside the visit window.
Reconcile dispensing records to dosing.
Draw site stock below threshold.
Attempt to dispense an expired kit.
Flag a temperature excursion; attempt to dispense.
Reconcile IRT inventory to physical count.
Perform emergency unblind as authorized role.
ExpectedResult: Treatment revealed; full audit trail recorded.

Steps: Attempt unblind as unauthorized role.
After unblind, verify safety notification.
ExpectedResult: Notification sent to medical monitor / safety.

Steps: Randomize; check enrollment notification.
Draw stock below threshold; check alert.
Reconcile IRT participants against EDC.
ExpectedResult: IRT and EDC participant lists reconcile.

Steps: Transfer randomization data to biostat.
